buildCommand: rm -rf /tmp/flutter && git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 --branch 3.38.5 /tmp/flutter && export PATH="/tmp/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=BOOKSTORE_API_BASE_URL=https://bookstoreapi.runasp.net
